author: Jorge Asenjo
name: GPTQ + EMA + XSA-all + BigramHash3072
blurb: 11L 512dim GQA8/4 MLP3x LeakyReLU^2 with BigramHash 3072x112, SmearGate, XSA on all 11 layers, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, U-Net skips, Value Embedding, EMA(0.997), Late QAT, GPTQ with Hessian-based quantization, zstd-22 compression, sliding window eval stride=32
